creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!
 
 > I wasn't aware that their was an issue with the port building on 7.2- 
 > stable AMD64.  Are their any special circumstances in which this patch  
 > is needed?
 
 I don't think so, no.
 
 See
 
 http://opsec.eu/backup/openjdk6-portupgrade
 
 for some failure log during an portupgrade.
 
 It also fails on fbsd8.0-beta3-i386 and fbsd6.3-i386 etc.
 
 -- 
 pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                        11 years to go !
